articles.title: Is Scituate native Conor Garland a worthwhile trade target for Bruins?
articles.description:
Garland is signed through the end of the 2031-32 season at a $6 million cap hit.

The post Is Scituate native Conor Garland a worthwhile trade target for Bruins? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Conor Garland, a Scituate native, is a potential trade target for the Bruins.
Garland is under contract until 2031-32 with a $6 million cap hit.
Acquiring Garland could enhance the Bruins' offensive capabilities this season.

articles.title: Shohei Ohtani is the show again in Japan for the World Baseball Classic
articles.description:
Asked if he might attempt to pitch, Ohtani replied: “It’s hard to say. But if (Mike) Trout shows up, it’s tempting,” he said, speaking through interpreter Will Ireton.

The post Shohei Ohtani is the show again in Japan for the World Baseball Classic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Shohei Ohtani hints at pitching if Mike Trout joins for the World Baseball Classic.
Ohtani's performance could influence local interest in baseball events in Boston.
Fans may gather to watch Ohtani's games, boosting local sports bar attendance.
